title: Harvie E. Ramsay 1949-2000
abstract: The sudden death of Harvie Ramsay from a brain haemorrhage on 24 April this year at the age of fifty-one greatly shocked and saddened his many friends and colleagues in the academic world and elsewhere. It has also deprived us of someone who had contributed so much to the areas of research and writing covered by this journal, for which he had been a member of the Editorial Board, and who still had so much to contribute.
